name: 评估与迭代
subject: design
domain_name: 设计循环 / Design Cycle / Design Cycle
curriculum_points: Students will be able to test their final product/solution against the original design specification and explain the success and limitations of the outcome.
Students in MYP 4-5 will be able to critically evaluate the impact of their solution on the client/target audience and propose detailed, realistic modifications for improvement.
